title: How Spotify runs agents across 20M+ lines of code, with Niklas Gustavsson
summary: Spotify uses Claude agents to enable rapid prototyping across a large codebase of 20M+ lines of code, allowing employees to describe ideas and generate working prototypes in hours. VP of Engineering Niklas Gustavsson described Spotify's deployment of Claude Cowork and Claude Code for agent-driven development.
writeup: This video features Niklas Gustavsson, VP of Engineering at Spotify, describing how the company deploys Claude agents across a codebase exceeding 20 million lines of code. The central claim: employees use agentic workflows to turn ideas into working prototypes in one to two hours. It matters as a concrete account of code generation and rapid prototyping at scale inside a large engineering organization, drawn from Gustavsson's remarks at Anthropic.
